ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "data_time" TEXT /* Time of the market data */,
  "market" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the market */,
  "connect_market" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the connected market */,
  "trade_direction" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the trade direction */,
  "data_feed_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the data feed */,
  "data_source_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data as recorded by the source */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Indicator of the quality of the data */,
  "data_status" TEXT /* Status of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_data_feed_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_feed_id") REFERENCES data_feeds ("data_feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_trade_direction FOREIGN KEY ("trade_direction") REFERENCES trade_directions ("trade_direction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_market FOREIGN KEY ("market") REFERENCES markets ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_connect_market FOREIGN KEY ("connect_market") REFERENCES connected_markets ("connect_market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the market data record */,
  "buy_turnover" INTEGER /* Buy turnover */,
  "sell_turnover" INTEGER /* Sell turnover */,
  "total_turnover" INTEGER /* Total turnover */,
  "net_turnover" INTEGER /* Net turnover */,
  "trade_price" TEXT /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the trade */,
  "trade_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market */,
  "market_type" TEXT /* Type of market */,
  "market_location" TEXT /* Location of the market */,
  "market_open_time" TEXT /* Time the market opens */,
  "market_close_time" TEXT /* Time the market closes */,
  "market_status" TEXT /* Status of the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "connected_markets" (
  "connect_market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each connected market */,
  "connect_market_name" TEXT /* Name of the connected market */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the market */,
  "connect_market_status" TEXT /* Status of the connected market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("connect_market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_connected_markets_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_directions" (
  "trade_direction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade direction */,
  "trade_direction_name" TEXT /* Name of the trade direction */,
  "direction_description" TEXT /* Description of the trade direction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_direction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_feeds" (
  "data_feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data feed */,
  "data_feed_name" TEXT /* Name of the data feed */,
  "data_feed_source" TEXT /* Source of the data feed */,
  "feed_format" TEXT /* Format of the data feed */,
  "feed_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the data feed */,
  "feed_status" TEXT /* Status of the data feed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_feed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of user creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the market data record */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the market data record */,
  "analytics_result" TEXT /* Analytics result */,
  "analytics_type" TEXT /* Type of analytics */,
  "analytics_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the analytics result */,
  "confidence_score" TEXT /* Confidence score of the analytics result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user who created the dashboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of dashboard creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "widgets" (
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget */,
  "widget_name" TEXT /* Name of the widget */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the dashboard */,
  "widget_description" TEXT /* Description of the widget */,
  "widget_type" TEXT /* Type of the widget */,
  "widget_status" TEXT /* Status of the widget */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of widget creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_widgets_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data_widgets" (
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the widget */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the market data record */,
  "widget_data" TEXT /* Market data for the widget */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_id", "data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news record */,
  "news_title" TEXT /* Title of the news */,
  "news_text" TEXT /* Text of the news */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date of the news */,
  "news_source" TEXT /* Source of the news */,
  "news_status" TEXT /* Status of the news */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_widgets" (
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the widget */,
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the news record */,
  "widget_news" TEXT /* News for the widget */,
  "news_type" TEXT /* Type of news */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_id", "news_id")
)
